records.evidence_label: Bulbapedia card page release information stamp/logo variant
records.notes: Release information explicitly documents an English-scoped stamp/logo variant. Evidence: This version has a red GameStop logo stamp in the bottom right corner of the artwork.

records.evidence_label: Bulbapedia card page release information stamp/logo variant
records.notes: Release information explicitly documents an English-scoped stamp/logo variant. Evidence: A Holofoil variant of the SWSH Black Star Promo print with an Eevee silhouette stamp was included in the kit, which was released on March 25, 2022.

records.evidence_label: Bulbapedia card page release information Cosmos Holofoil version
records.notes: Release information explicitly documents an English-scoped Cosmos Holofoil version. Evidence: Initial print-runs were Mirror Holofoil, but Collector Chests started including Cosmos Holofoil variants by February 2023.
